features: What You Will Get - - 1 pack compatible toner cartridge 149A W1490A black [Without Chip, With Chip Disassembling and Installation Tools]; Alternative Replacement for HP 149X W1490X 149A W1490A Toner Cartridges.

Compatible Printer Model - - Compatible for use in HP LaserJet Pro 4002 4002dw 4002dn; HP LaserJet Pro MFP 4102 4102dw 4102fdw 4102fdn Printer.If your printer model has "e", to avoid unnecessary trouble, please purchase the original model directly.
High Print Yields - - Standard capacity 2,900 pages at 5% coverage, A4 paper, letter. (ISO/IEC standard).
High Performance - - We provide the best printing effect for users like the original toner. The image resolution is clear, and has strong layers. The color is uniform, clear and comfortable.

Note - - Our compatible cartridges do not have chips, need to remove the old original chip and install it on the new toner cartridge, please view the user guide we provided for the specific methods of installing.
